hibernate-mapping.sql-query: SELECT SUM (TotalWages) TotalWages, SUM (TaxableWages) TaxableWages, SUM (TipsTaxableWagesAmount) TipsTaxableWagesAmount, SUM (TaxAmount) TaxAmount, employee_fk, companyLaw_fk FROM ( SELECT SUM (COALESCE (tax.Total_Wages_Amount, 0)) AS TotalWages, SUM (COALESCE (tax.Taxable_Wages_Amount, 0)) AS TaxableWages, SUM (COALESCE (tax.Tips_Taxable_Wage_Amount, 0)) AS TipsTaxableWagesAmount, SUM (COALESCE (tax.Tax_Liability_Amount, 0)) AS TaxAmount, PC.SOURCE_EMPLOYEE_FK AS employee_fk, tax.company_law_fk AS companyLaw_fk FROM psp_Tax tax JOIN psp_paycheck pc ON TAX.PAYCHECK_FK = pc.paycheck_seq and pc.company_fk = :companySeqId JOIN psp_company_law cl2 ON TAX.company_law_fk = cl2.company_law_seq WHERE tax.company_fk = :companySeqId and pc.Status = 'Active' AND pc.SOURCE_PAYCHECK_ID not like '-%' AND exists (select '1' from psp_emp_totals_payroll_run etpr join psp_payroll_run pr on pr.payroll_run_seq = etpr.PAYROLL_RUN_FK where etpr.PAYROLL_RUN_FK = PC.PAYROLL_RUN_FK and etpr.COMPANY_FK = :companySeqId and etpr.quarter_start_date = :quarterStartDate AND pr.PAYROLL_RUN_STATUS != 'Superseded') and cl2.is_archived = 0 GROUP BY PC.SOURCE_EMPLOYEE_FK, tax.company_law_fk UNION ALL SELECT SUM (COALESCE (la.Total_Wages, 0)) AS TotalWages, SUM (COALESCE (la.Taxable_Wages, 0)) AS TaxableWages, 0 AS TipsTaxableWagesAmount, SUM (COALESCE (la.Amount, 0)) AS TaxAmount, LA.EMPLOYEE_FK AS employee_fk, LA.company_law_fk AS companyLaw_fk FROM psp_Liability_Adjustment la JOIN psp_company_law cl3 ON la.company_law_fk = cl3.company_law_seq WHERE exists (select '1' from psp_emp_totals_payroll_run etpr where etpr.PAYROLL_RUN_FK = la.PAYROLL_RUN_FK and etpr.COMPANY_FK = :companySeqId and etpr.quarter_start_date = :quarterStartDate) and la.employee_fk is not null and cl3.is_archived = 0 GROUP BY LA.EMPLOYEE_FK, LA.company_law_fk) result GROUP BY employee_fk, companyLaw_fk ORDER BY employee_fk, companyLaw_fk

SELECT SUM (TotalWages) TotalWages, SUM (TaxableWages) TaxableWages, SUM (TipsTaxableWagesAmount) TipsTaxableWagesAmount, SUM (TaxAmount) TaxAmount, employee_fk, company_fk FROM ( SELECT SUM (COALESCE (tax.Total_Wages_Amount, 0)) AS TotalWages, SUM (COALESCE (tax.Taxable_Wages_Amount, 0)) AS TaxableWages, SUM (COALESCE (tax.Tips_Taxable_Wage_Amount, 0)) AS TipsTaxableWagesAmount, SUM (COALESCE (tax.Tax_Liability_Amount, 0)) AS TaxAmount, PC.SOURCE_EMPLOYEE_FK AS employee_fk, pr.company_fk as company_fk FROM psp_Tax tax JOIN psp_paycheck pc ON TAX.PAYCHECK_FK = pc.paycheck_seq and pc.company_fk = tax.company_fk JOIN psp_payroll_run pr ON PR.PAYROLL_RUN_SEQ = PC.PAYROLL_RUN_FK JOIN psp_company_law cl2 ON TAX.company_law_fk = cl2.company_law_seq JOIN psp_company co ON co.company_seq = tax.company_fk WHERE pc.Status = 'Active' AND pc.SOURCE_PAYCHECK_ID not like '-%' AND pr.Paycheck_Date between :fromDate and :toDate AND TAX.LAW_FK = :lawId AND PR.company_fk in ( select distinct company_fk from psp_company_law cl inner join psp_company_agency ca on CA.COMPANY_AGENCY_SEQ = CL.COMPANY_AGENCY_FK inner join psp_law l on l.law_id = cl.law_fk where law_fk = :lawId ) and tax.company_fk = pr.company_fk and cl2.is_archived = 0 AND pr.PAYROLL_RUN_STATUS != 'Superseded' AND (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = 1) THEN co.is_dg_disassociated ELSE 0 END) = 0 GROUP BY pr.company_fk, PC.SOURCE_EMPLOYEE_FK UNION ALL SELECT SUM (COALESCE (la.Total_Wages, 0)) AS TotalWages, SUM (COALESCE (la.Taxable_Wages, 0)) AS TaxableWages, 0 AS TipsTaxableWagesAmount, SUM (COALESCE (la.Amount, 0)) AS TaxAmount, LA.EMPLOYEE_FK AS employee_fk, LA.COMPANY_FK as company_fk FROM psp_Liability_Adjustment la JOIN psp_payroll_run pr ON LA.PAYROLL_RUN_FK = PR.PAYROLL_RUN_SEQ JOIN psp_company_law cl3 ON la.company_law_fk = cl3.company_law_seq JOIN psp_company pco on pco.COMPANY_SEQ = la.COMPANY_FK WHERE pr.Paycheck_Date between :fromDate and :toDate AND LA.LAW_FK = :lawId AND LA.EMPLOYEE_FK IS NOT NULL AND la.company_fk in ( select distinct company_fk from psp_company_law cl inner join psp_company_agency ca on CA.COMPANY_AGENCY_SEQ = CL.COMPANY_AGENCY_FK inner join psp_law l on l.law_id = cl.law_fk where law_fk = :lawId) and cl3.is_archived = 0 AND pr.PAYROLL_RUN_STATUS != 'Superseded' AND (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = 1) THEN pco.is_dg_disassociated ELSE 0 END) = 0 GROUP BY la.company_fk, LA.EMPLOYEE_FK) x WHERE EXISTS (select 'x' from psp_company_service cs where cs.company_fk = x.company_fk and cs.service_fk = 'Tax') GROUP BY company_fk, employee_fk ORDER BY company_fk, employee_fk

SELECT SUM (TotalWages) TotalWages, SUM (TaxableWages) TaxableWages, SUM (TipsTaxableWagesAmount) TipsTaxableWagesAmount, SUM (TaxAmount) TaxAmount, employee_fk, company_fk FROM ( SELECT SUM (COALESCE (tax.Total_Wages_Amount, 0)) AS TotalWages, SUM (COALESCE (tax.Taxable_Wages_Amount, 0)) AS TaxableWages, SUM (COALESCE (tax.Tips_Taxable_Wage_Amount, 0)) AS TipsTaxableWagesAmount, SUM (COALESCE (tax.Tax_Liability_Amount, 0)) AS TaxAmount, PC.SOURCE_EMPLOYEE_FK AS employee_fk, pr.company_fk as company_fk FROM psp_Tax tax JOIN psp_paycheck pc ON TAX.PAYCHECK_FK = pc.paycheck_seq and pc.company_fk = tax.company_fk JOIN psp_payroll_run pr ON PR.PAYROLL_RUN_SEQ = PC.PAYROLL_RUN_FK JOIN psp_company_law cl2 ON TAX.company_law_fk = cl2.company_law_seq JOIN psp_company co ON co.company_seq = tax.company_fk WHERE pc.Status = 'Active' AND pc.SOURCE_PAYCHECK_ID not like '-%' AND pr.Paycheck_Date between :fromDate and :toDate AND TAX.LAW_FK = :lawId AND PR.company_fk in ( select distinct company_fk from psp_company_law cl inner join psp_company_agency ca on CA.COMPANY_AGENCY_SEQ = CL.COMPANY_AGENCY_FK inner join psp_law l on l.law_id = cl.law_fk where law_fk = :lawId ) and tax.company_fk = pr.company_fk and cl2.is_archived = 0 AND pr.PAYROLL_RUN_STATUS != 'Superseded' AND (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = TRUE) THEN co.is_dg_disassociated ELSE 0 END) = 0 GROUP BY pr.company_fk, PC.SOURCE_EMPLOYEE_FK UNION ALL SELECT SUM (COALESCE (la.Total_Wages, 0)) AS TotalWages, SUM (COALESCE (la.Taxable_Wages, 0)) AS TaxableWages, 0 AS TipsTaxableWagesAmount, SUM (COALESCE (la.Amount, 0)) AS TaxAmount, LA.EMPLOYEE_FK AS employee_fk, LA.COMPANY_FK as company_fk FROM psp_Liability_Adjustment la JOIN psp_payroll_run pr ON LA.PAYROLL_RUN_FK = PR.PAYROLL_RUN_SEQ JOIN psp_company_law cl3 ON la.company_law_fk = cl3.company_law_seq JOIN psp_company pco on pco.COMPANY_SEQ = la.COMPANY_FK WHERE pr.Paycheck_Date between :fromDate and :toDate AND LA.LAW_FK = :lawId AND LA.EMPLOYEE_FK IS NOT NULL AND la.company_fk in ( select distinct company_fk from psp_company_law cl inner join psp_company_agency ca on CA.COMPANY_AGENCY_SEQ = CL.COMPANY_AGENCY_FK inner join psp_law l on l.law_id = cl.law_fk where law_fk = :lawId) and cl3.is_archived = 0 AND pr.PAYROLL_RUN_STATUS != 'Superseded' AND (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = TRUE) THEN pco.is_dg_disassociated ELSE 0 END) = 0 GROUP BY la.company_fk, LA.EMPLOYEE_FK) x WHERE EXISTS (select 'x' from psp_company_service cs where cs.company_fk = x.company_fk and cs.service_fk = 'Tax') GROUP BY company_fk, employee_fk ORDER BY company_fk, employee_fk

SELECT distinct cs.company_fk as company_seq FROM psp_company_service cs INNER JOIN psp_company_agency ca ON ca.company_fk = cs.company_fk INNER JOIN psp_company_law cl ON cl.company_agency_fk= ca.company_agency_seq INNER JOIN psp_company c on ca.company_fk = c.company_seq WHERE cl.law_fk = :lawId AND cs.service_fk = 'Tax' AND cl.filing_status = 'Active' AND cl.exemption_status = 'NonExempt' AND (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = 1) THEN c.is_dg_disassociated ELSE 0 END) = 0

SELECT distinct cs.company_fk as company_seq FROM psp_company_service cs INNER JOIN psp_company_agency ca ON ca.company_fk = cs.company_fk INNER JOIN psp_company_law cl ON cl.company_agency_fk= ca.company_agency_seq INNER JOIN psp_company c on ca.company_fk = c.company_seq WHERE cl.law_fk = :lawId AND cs.service_fk = 'Tax' AND cl.filing_status = 'Active' AND cl.exemption_status = 'NonExempt' AND (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = TRUE) THEN c.is_dg_disassociated ELSE 0 END) = 0
select distinct company_fk companyId, quarter_start_date fromDate from psp_emp_totals_payroll_run etpr where etpr.quarter_start_date = :fromDate or etpr.status = 'Pending'

select distinct company_fk companyId, quarter_start_date fromDate from psp_emp_totals_payroll_run etpr where REGEXP_LIKE(etpr.company_fk, :compSeqPattern) and (etpr.quarter_start_date = :fromDate or etpr.status = 'Pending')
select distinct company_fk companyId from psp_emp_totals_payroll_run etpr where etpr.quarter_start_date = :fromDate
select distinct company_fk companyId from psp_emp_totals_payroll_run etpr where REGEXP_LIKE(etpr.company_fk, :compSeqPattern) and etpr.quarter_start_date = :fromDate
select distinct company_fk companyId, quarter_start_date fromDate from psp_emp_totals_payroll_run etpr where etpr.status = 'Pending'
select distinct company_fk companyId, quarter_start_date fromDate from psp_emp_totals_payroll_run etpr where etpr.quarter_start_date < :cutOffDate and etpr.status = 'Pending'

select c.source_company_id as companyId, SUBSTR(PAYMENT_TEMPLATE_CD, 1 ,INSTR(PAYMENT_TEMPLATE_CD, '-', 1, 1)-1) as state, count(distinct et.employee_fk) as "W2Count" from psp_employee_w2_totals et inner join psp_company c on c.company_seq = et.company_fk inner join psp_law l on et.law_fk = L.LAW_ID inner join psp_payment_template pt on PT.PAYMENT_TEMPLATE_CD = L.PAYMENT_TEMPLATE_FK where year = :processingYear and et.taxable_wages > 0 and l.law_category_code = 'Withholding' and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = 1) THEN c.is_dg_disassociated ELSE 0 END) = 0 group by c.source_company_id, SUBSTR(PAYMENT_TEMPLATE_CD, 1 ,INSTR(PAYMENT_TEMPLATE_CD, '-', 1, 1)-1) order by c.source_company_id, SUBSTR(PAYMENT_TEMPLATE_CD, 1 ,INSTR(PAYMENT_TEMPLATE_CD, '-', 1, 1)-1)

select c.source_company_id as companyId, SUBSTR(PAYMENT_TEMPLATE_CD, 1 ,STRPOS(PAYMENT_TEMPLATE_CD, '-')-1) as state, count(distinct et.employee_fk) as "W2Count" from psp_employee_w2_totals et inner join psp_company c on c.company_seq = et.company_fk inner join psp_law l on et.law_fk = L.LAW_ID inner join psp_payment_template pt on PT.PAYMENT_TEMPLATE_CD = L.PAYMENT_TEMPLATE_FK where year = :processingYear and et.taxable_wages > 0 and l.law_category_code = 'Withholding' and (CASE WHEN (:excludeDeletedCompany = TRUE) THEN c.is_dg_disassociated ELSE 0 END) = 0 group by c.source_company_id, SUBSTR(PAYMENT_TEMPLATE_CD, 1 ,STRPOS(PAYMENT_TEMPLATE_CD, '-')-1) order by c.source_company_id, SUBSTR(PAYMENT_TEMPLATE_CD, 1 ,STRPOS(PAYMENT_TEMPLATE_CD, '-')-1)
hibernate-mapping.query: select pe.Id, pe.HireDate, pe.TerminationDate from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Employee as pe where pe.Company.Id = :companyId and ((pe.TerminationDate between :fromDate and :toDate) or (pe.HireDate between :fromDate and :toDate))
hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select LA.COMPANY_FK as companySeq, LA.LAW_FK as lawId, sum(LA.AMOUNT)as amount, min(LA.created_date) as fromDate from psp_liability_adjustment la inner join psp_law l on l.law_id = la.law_fk inner join psp_payment_template pt on pt.payment_template_cd = l.payment_template_fk where REGEXP_LIKE(la.creator_id, '^[0-9]+$') and LA.EFFECTIVE_DATE between :fromDate and :toDate and pt.CATEGORY = 'SUI' group by la.company_fk, la.law_fk

select employeeSeq, rate from ( select PC.SOURCE_EMPLOYEE_FK employeeSeq, qbdtLineInfo.rate rate, pr.paycheck_date, ROW_NUMBER () OVER ( PARTITION BY PC.SOURCE_EMPLOYEE_FK ORDER BY pr.paycheck_date desc, rate desc) rn from psp_payroll_run pr join psp_paycheck pc on pr.payroll_run_seq = pc.payroll_run_fk and pc.Status = 'Active' AND pc.SOURCE_PAYCHECK_ID not like '-%' AND pc.company_fk = :companyId join psp_tax pt on PC.PAYCHECK_SEQ = PT.PAYCHECK_FK AND pt.company_fk = :companyId JOIN psp_compensation comp ON comp.paycheck_fk = pc.paycheck_seq AND comp.company_fk = :companyId JOIN psp_company_payroll_item cpritem ON comp.company_payroll_item_fk = cpritem.company_payroll_item_seq AND cpritem.payroll_item_fk = 'Hourly' AND cpritem.is_archived = 0 join psp_qbdt_payroll_item_info qbdtInfo on qbdtInfo.company_payroll_item_fk = comp.company_payroll_item_fk and qbdtInfo.pay_type = 'REG' join psp_qbdt_payline_info qbdtLineInfo ON qbdtLineInfo.compensation_fk = comp.compensation_seq AND qbdtLineInfo.company_fk = :companyId where exists (select '1' from psp_emp_totals_payroll_run etpr where etpr.payroll_run_fk = pr.payroll_run_seq and etpr.company_fk = :companyId and etpr.quarter_start_date = :quarterStartDate) AND pr.PAYROLL_RUN_STATUS != 'Superseded') result where rn = 1

select employeeSeq, rate from ( select PC.SOURCE_EMPLOYEE_FK employeeSeq, qbdtLineInfo.rate rate, pr.paycheck_date, ROW_NUMBER () OVER ( PARTITION BY PC.SOURCE_EMPLOYEE_FK ORDER BY pr.paycheck_date desc, rate desc) rn from psp_payroll_run pr join psp_paycheck pc on pr.payroll_run_seq = pc.payroll_run_fk and pc.Status = 'Active' AND pc.SOURCE_PAYCHECK_ID not like '-%' AND pc.company_fk = :companyId join psp_tax pt on PC.PAYCHECK_SEQ = PT.PAYCHECK_FK AND pt.company_fk = :companyId JOIN psp_compensation comp ON comp.paycheck_fk = pc.paycheck_seq AND comp.company_fk = :companyId JOIN psp_company_payroll_item cpritem ON comp.company_payroll_item_fk = cpritem.company_payroll_item_seq AND cpritem.payroll_item_fk = 'Hourly' AND cpritem.is_archived = 0 AND cpritem.source_description NOT LIKE 'Overtime%' join psp_qbdt_payroll_item_info qbdtInfo on qbdtInfo.company_payroll_item_fk = comp.company_payroll_item_fk and qbdtInfo.pay_type = 'REG' join psp_qbdt_payline_info qbdtLineInfo ON qbdtLineInfo.compensation_fk = comp.compensation_seq AND qbdtLineInfo.company_fk = :companyId where exists (select '1' from psp_emp_totals_payroll_run etpr where etpr.payroll_run_fk = pr.payroll_run_seq and etpr.company_fk = :companyId and etpr.quarter_start_date = :quarterStartDate) AND pr.PAYROLL_RUN_STATUS != 'Superseded') result where rn = 1

select source_employee_fk as employeeSeq, law_id as lawId, least(1, sum(m1_ind)) as m1, least(1, sum(m2_ind)) as m2, least(1, sum(m3_ind)) as m3 from ( select source_employee_fk, law_id, case when :m1 between trunc(pay_period_begin_date) and trunc(pay_period_end_date) then 1 else 0 end as m1_ind, case when :m2 between trunc(pay_period_begin_date) and trunc(pay_period_end_date) then 1 else 0 end as m2_ind, case when :m3 between trunc(pay_period_begin_date) and trunc(pay_period_end_date) then 1 else 0 end as m3_ind from psp_paycheck pc join psp_tax t on t.paycheck_fk = pc.paycheck_seq and t.company_fk = :companyId join psp_law l on l.law_id = t.law_fk and requires_month_counts = '1' where exists (select '1' from psp_emp_totals_payroll_run etpr join psp_payroll_run pr on pr.payroll_run_Seq = etpr.PAYROLL_RUN_FK where etpr.payroll_run_fk = pc.payroll_run_fk and etpr.company_fk = :companyId and etpr.quarter_start_date = :qtrStart and pr.PAYROLL_RUN_STATUS != 'Superseded') and pc.status = 'Active' AND pc.SOURCE_PAYCHECK_ID not like '-%' and pc.source_employee_fk is not null and pc.pay_period_begin_date is not null and pc.pay_period_end_date is not null and pc.company_fk = :companyId ) result group by source_employee_fk, law_id

select source_employee_fk as employeeSeq, law_id as lawId, least(1, sum(m1_ind)) as m1, least(1, sum(m2_ind)) as m2, least(1, sum(m3_ind)) as m3 from ( select source_employee_fk, law_id, case when :m1 between date_trunc('day',pay_period_begin_date) and date_trunc('day',pay_period_end_date) then 1 else 0 end as m1_ind, case when :m2 between date_trunc('day',pay_period_begin_date) and date_trunc('day',pay_period_end_date) then 1 else 0 end as m2_ind, case when :m3 between date_trunc('day',pay_period_begin_date) and date_trunc('day',pay_period_end_date) then 1 else 0 end as m3_ind from psp_paycheck pc join psp_tax t on t.paycheck_fk = pc.paycheck_seq and t.company_fk = :companyId join psp_law l on l.law_id = t.law_fk and requires_month_counts = '1' where exists (select '1' from psp_emp_totals_payroll_run etpr join psp_payroll_run pr on pr.payroll_run_Seq = etpr.PAYROLL_RUN_FK where etpr.payroll_run_fk = pc.payroll_run_fk and etpr.company_fk = :companyId and etpr.quarter_start_date = :qtrStart and pr.PAYROLL_RUN_STATUS != 'Superseded') and pc.status = 'Active' AND pc.SOURCE_PAYCHECK_ID not like '-%' and pc.source_employee_fk is not null and pc.pay_period_begin_date is not null and pc.pay_period_end_date is not null and pc.company_fk = :companyId ) result group by source_employee_fk, law_id

select source_employee_fk as employeeSeq, law_id as lawId, sum(hours) as hours from ( select source_employee_fk, law_id, cmp.paycheck_fk, COALESCE(sum(hours_worked), 0) as hours from psp_paycheck pc join psp_compensation cmp on cmp.paycheck_fk = pc.paycheck_seq and cmp.company_fk = :companyId join psp_tax t on t.paycheck_fk = cmp.paycheck_fk and t.company_fk = :companyId join psp_law l on l.law_id = t.law_fk and l.law_id in (:lawIds) join psp_company_payroll_item cpi on company_payroll_item_seq = cmp.company_payroll_item_fk join psp_qbdt_payroll_item_info qpii on qpii.company_payroll_item_fk = company_payroll_item_seq join psp_payroll_item on payroll_item_fk = payroll_item_code and (payroll_item_code='Salary' or payroll_item_code='Hourly') join psp_hours_worked_exception hwe on hwe.law_fk = law_id and payroll_item_code = payroll_item_cd and qpii.pay_type = hwe.pay_type where pc.status = 'Active' AND pc.SOURCE_PAYCHECK_ID not like '-%' and exists (select '1' from psp_emp_totals_payroll_run etpr join psp_payroll_run pr on pr.PAYROLL_RUN_SEQ = etpr.PAYROLL_RUN_FK where etpr.payroll_run_fk = pc.payroll_run_fk and etpr.company_fk = :companyId and etpr.quarter_start_date = :qtrStart and pr.PAYROLL_RUN_STATUS != 'Superseded') and cpi.is_archived = 0 and pc.company_fk = :companyId group by source_employee_fk, law_id, cmp.paycheck_fk ) result group by source_employee_fk, law_id having sum(hours)>0
